rationale: Educ. Code §49.156 governs voter approval for school district attendance-credit purchase agreements. It does not reference or depend on the Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amount, so raising the exemption creates no conflict.
quote: The proposition is approved if the proposition receives a favorable vote of a majority of the votes cast.
_note: No textual or operational link between the proposed homestead exemption increase and this voter-approval provision.
